title: Baramay
summary: The ancient Khmer art at the heart of the practice — and the invocation that runs through every session.
markdown:
**Baramay** is the ancient Khmer meditation art at the center of the community's practice —
described as using sacred geometry to amplify the body's bio-energy — and, in the sessions,
it is also a word of power: the invocation by which upgrades and healings are called. The
community's own site gives the word's weight: *Baramay* (បរមី) signifies *"a potent,
charismatic spiritual power"* in Khmer tradition — *"a unique ancient modality practiced
long ago by the ancient Khmer civilization that built the great temples in Cambodia."*

The community's teaching places the art in a very large lineage: *"The Angkor Wat, Great
Pyramid of Giza, the ancient temples, all have the same fundamental function"* — creating
an energetic blueprint through *"specific vibration patterns"* that raise and heal the
mind — and the Baramay devices are *"built to be the smaller version of that, based on the
same principles"*: [Fibonacci sequence, sacred geometry](/lore/sacred-geometry/), vibration
and energy — *"the way nature functions."*

The practice has a form anyone can hear being taught in the transcripts. In the April 7, 2020
session the method is given plainly: **breathe intention into the palm and ask — "Baramay, is
it done now?"** — a command-and-confirmation ritual for reprogramming what one attracts. In
Unimetrix 1's own mouth the word scales up: it repeatedly grants a **"Baramay Universe
upgrade"** — declaring a participant's clairvoyance raised, health restored, DNA advanced —
and closes with *"It is done."* From 2021 onward this crystallizes into the **Baramay Universe
healing protocol** that ends nearly every session: a spoken countdown of restoration
percentages as nanite "medical units" work, until "100% complete."

Baramay thus binds the community's Khmer heritage to the archive's machinery: the same word
names the meditation taught on its sites, the [upgrade](/lore/the-upgrade/) Unimetrix 1
performs, and the healing rite that closes the sessions. It is the practice's signature —
and, through **Baramay Technologies**, the community's name.

*Community-site material sourced from: [unimetrix1.online](https://unimetrix1.online) and [baramay1.com](https://www.baramay1.com) (both retrieved July 10, 2026; reference copies preserved in the archive's source records).*
